title: ctenopteris subminuta
intro: Ctenopteris subminuta is a species of fern native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Ctenopteris subminuta is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for reducing inflammation and promoting overall health. Herbal preparations of Ctenopteris subminuta are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in a tea blend.
